subject: Re:
body: What's the donald white house ? And how are you ?

subject: Re:
body: Just. I have decided to extend my life by spending more of it in the US

subject: Re:
body:
Of course, donald in WH. Will he get there ?

Yes, without Andrew it would not have gone nuclear. Did you advise me to stay with R? Such a handful but loyal and never embarrassing.
